title: Meet New York’s CE Requirements with NO State Reporting and NO Hidden Fees
body:
Meet New York’s CE Requirements with NO State Reporting and NO Hidden Fees

Including New Ethics, Law, and Diversity Requirements

Save Time and Money as You Meet New York’s Brand-New Ethics, Law, and Diversity Requirements

As a producer or adjuster in New York, you have new CE requirements. Take the headache out of meeting those requirements with our course designed to meet your needs. Your three-hour course is just $25 - no hidden fees, no state reporting fees - $25 period.

★ New

New York Law for Property and Casualty Insurance

New York Law for Property and Casualty Insurance, Ethics and Professionalism, and Diversity, Inclusion, and the Elimination of Bias

Created for property and casualty insurance producers to fulfill the New York requirement of one hour of continuing education covering Insurance Law, one hour of continuing education covering Ethics and Professionalism, and one hour of continuing education covering Diversity, Inclusion, and the Elimination of Bias. This three-hour course is $25 - no hidden fees, no state reporting fees - $25 period.

Register Here!
★ New

New York Law for Life and Health Insurance

New York Law for Life and Health Insurance, Ethics and Professionalism, and Diversity, Inclusion, and the Elimination of Bias 

Created for life and health insurance producers to fulfill the New York requirement of one hour of continuing education covering Insurance Law, one hour of continuing education covering Ethics and Professionalism, and one hour of continuing education covering Diversity, Inclusion, and the Elimination of Bias. This three-hour course is $25 - no hidden fees, no state reporting fees - $25 period.

Register Here!

Both courses are created for insurance producers to fulfill the New York requirement of one hour of continuing education covering Insurance Law, one hour of continuing education covering Ethics and Professionalism, and one hour of continuing education covering Diversity, Inclusion, and the Elimination of Bias.

Every on-demand course from CEU features:

  • Unlimited access for 12 months to 150+ approved on-demand courses and live webinars
  • NO state reporting, hidden, or surprise fees
  • Learn anytime, anywhere: start on your laptop and finish on your phone with our web app
  • Unlimited exam retakes for on-demand courses
  • CE credits reported within two business days 

Save even more money with on-demand CEU Unlimited 

Enjoy 12 months of full access access to our full library of on-demand courses and live webinars for one low price of $85 a year. Learn more and get your access now!
